blogs.title: Introducing Crisp Chat: Enhance Your Flutter Apps with Real-time Customer Support

blogs.title: Taking Back Control: How I Fixed Crisp FCM Notifications in a Flutter Plugin
blogs.description: Discover the journey of fixing Firebase Cloud Messaging notifications in the Crisp Flutter plugin and implementing custom notification handling.
blogs.author: Md. Al-Amin

blogs.title: How a Bug Report Led Me to Give Flutter Developers Full Control of Crisp Chat Modals on iOS
blogs.description: One of the things I enjoy most about maintaining open-source software is that sometimes the best improvements start with something very small.
blogs.author: Md. Al-Amin

blogs.title: Swift Package Manager and Flutter iOS Plugins: The crisp_chat 2.4.8 Fix Story
blogs.description: In this article, I share the story of how I fixed a critical issue in the crisp_chat Flutter plugin related to Swift Package Manager and iOS plugins, ensuring a smoother experience for developers.
blogs.author: Md. Al-Amin

blogs.title: Flutter Promised “Write Once, Run Anywhere.” My Plugin Didn’t, Until Now.
blogs.description: How a single GitHub issue pushed crisp_chat from mobile-only to Android, iOS, Web, macOS, Windows, and Linux — with one Dart API.
blogs.author: Md. Al-Amin
